description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectangular design with a mix of brick and concrete exterior walls, large arched windows, and a flat roof. The front facade is defined by two prominent arched windows and a central entrance, flanked by a garage on one side and a small garden area on the other. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and lush landscaping, including several large trees. The side view reveals a glass-walled room, likely a sunroom or enclosed patio, and additional windows that provide ample natural light. The property is set on a green lawn with flower beds and paved walkways, creating a welcoming residential environment. The overall structure is low-rise, with a single main story and a partial upper level or loft visible through the roof cutaway.
description: A modern, brick-and-concrete bungalow with arched windows, a flat roof, garage, and a backyard pool, set on a landscaped lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large arched windows, garage, and a small garden area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass-walled room, garage, and large trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the backyard pool, patio seating, and multiple windows overlooking the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the garage, flower beds, and a clear view of the pool and patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large arched front windows and grouped side and rear windows
